user.title: Connect to PJLink projector
user.description: Set up a PJLink projector or display device.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the projector.
data_description.password: Password for PJLink authentication (leave blank if none).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the projector. Please check the host and port.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your password.
